ddls:
CREATE TABLE "birth_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "name_id" INTEGER /* ID of the name associated with the births */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the births were recorded */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individuals born */,
  "births" INTEGER /* Count of births for the name in that year */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_collection_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection method */,
  "record_status" TEXT /* Status of the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_birth_records_name_id FOREIGN KEY ("name_id") REFERENCES names ("name_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_birth_records_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_birth_records_sex FOREIGN KEY ("sex") REFERENCES sex_types ("sex_description"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_birth_records_data_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_collection_method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_birth_records_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "names" (
  "name_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the name */,
  "name" TEXT /* The actual name string (e.g., Michael) */,
  "name_variant" TEXT /* Variations of the name (e.g., Mike, Mikey) */,
  "name_type" TEXT /* Type of name (e.g., first name, last name) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("name_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year of the birth records */,
  "year_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "year_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sex_types" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for sex type */,
  "sex_description" TEXT /* Description of the sex (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "sex_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sex type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "birth_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistic entry */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the statistics */,
  "total_births" INTEGER /* Total number of births recorded in that year */,
  "average_births" REAL /* Average number of births per unique name in that year */,
  "average_births_by_region" REAL /* Average number of births per unique name in each region */,
  "total_births_by_region" INTEGER /* Total number of births in each region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_birth_statistics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Northeast, Midwest) */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "birth_region_records" (
  "region_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region record entry */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the birth record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region associated with the birth record */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was created or updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_birth_region_records_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_birth_region_records_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES birth_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Census Bureau) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method (e.g., Surveys, Official Records) */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "method_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Researcher, Analyst) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role and permissions */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role assigned to the user */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES birth_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the quality check */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the check was performed */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the record is valid */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the check */,
  "check_result_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the check result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES birth_records ("record_id")
)
